'''dhazocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumonocyte|pneumonocyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumonocyte|pneumonocyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhazocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzecheth|dhæzecheth]] || [[word:dhæzechej|dhæzechej]] || [[word:dhæzechesh|dhæzechesh]] || [[word:dhæzeche|dhæzeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazozochoth|dhazozochoth]] || [[word:dhazozochoj|dhazozochoj]] || [[word:dhazozochosh|dhazozochosh]] || [[word:dhazozocho|dhazozocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazochoth|dhazochoth]] || [[word:dhazochoj|dhazochoj]] || [[word:dhazochosh|dhazochosh]] || [[word:dhazocho|dhazocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazofchoth|dhazofchoth]] || [[word:dhazofchoj|dhazofchoj]] || [[word:dhazofchosh|dhazofchosh]] || [[word:dhazofchof|dhazofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazochotho|dhazochotho]] || [[word:dhazochojo|dhazochojo]] || [[word:dhazochosho|dhazochosho]] || [[word:dhazochoko|dhazochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazochoth|dhazochoth]] || [[word:dhazochoj|dhazochoj]] || [[word:dhazochosh|dhazochosh]] || [[word:dhazocho|dhazocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazochothol|dhazochothol]] || [[word:dhazochojol|dhazochojol]] || [[word:dhazochoshol|dhazochoshol]] || [[word:dhazochokol|dhazochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazochothotho|dhazochothotho]] || [[word:dhazochojojo|dhazochojojo]] || [[word:dhazochoshosho|dhazochoshosho]] || [[word:dhazochoko|dhazochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazochothon|dhazochothon]] || [[word:dhazochojon|dhazochojon]] || [[word:dhazochoshon|dhazochoshon]] || [[word:dhazochokon|dhazochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazochothoro|dhazochothoro]] || [[word:dhazochojoro|dhazochojoro]] || [[word:dhazochoshoro|dhazochoshoro]] || [[word:dhazochokoro|dhazochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
